---
title: "Microclimate.jl — Montpellier 2026"
format:
  html:
    theme: simple
---

A 10-minute talk on [Microclimate.jl](https://github.com/BiophysicalEcology/Microclimate.jl) and [BiophysicalGrids.jl](https://github.com/BiophysicalEcology/BiophysicalGrids.jl).

[Open the slides →](talk.html)

## What's here

- [Slides](talk.html) — Quarto + reveal.js
- [Source repository](https://github.com/BiophysicalEcology) — code, figure-generating scripts, CI

Every figure in the deck is regenerated by Julia in GitHub Actions before publishing.
